# pe-mcp-gitlab

> A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that exposes GitLab REST API v4 operations as tools for AI assistants.

pe-mcp-gitlab v1.8.0 is a single static binary (Go) that runs locally via stdio or remotely via HTTP transport.
It provides 1004 individual MCP tools across 95 GitLab API domains, 40 meta-tools (59 with enterprise mode),
24 resources, 38 prompts, and 6 MCP capabilities. Cross-platform: Windows, Linux, macOS (amd64 + arm64).

## Quick Start

1. Download the binary for your platform from the Releases page
2. Run `pe-mcp-gitlab --setup` to launch the interactive setup wizard
3. The wizard configures your AI client (VS Code, Cursor, Claude Desktop, etc.)

## Configuration (environment variables — stdio mode)

- GITLAB_URL: GitLab instance URL (required)
- GITLAB_TOKEN: Personal Access Token (required)
- GITLAB_SKIP_TLS_VERIFY: Skip TLS verification for self-signed certs (default: false)
- META_TOOLS: Enable meta-tools for reduced tool count (default: true)
- GITLAB_ENTERPRISE: Enable enterprise/premium tools (default: false)

## Tool Domains

Access, Admin, Analyze CI Configuration, Analyze Deployment History, Analyze Issue Scope, Analyze MR Changes, Analyze Pipeline Failure, Branch, CI Variable, Deployment, Environment, Feature Flags, Find Technical Debt, Generate Milestone Report, Generate Release Notes, Group, Issue, Job, MR Review, Merge Request, Package, Pipeline, Pipeline Schedule, Project, Release, Repository, Resolve Project From Remote, Review MR Security, Runner, Runner Controller, Runner Controller Scope, Runner Controller Token, Search, Snippet, Summarize Issue, Summarize MR Review, Tag, Template, User, Wiki.

## Meta-Tools (default mode)

When META_TOOLS=true (default), 40 domain meta-tools are registered instead of
1004 individual tools. Each meta-tool groups related operations under a single
tool with an "action" parameter. Key meta-tools:

- gitlab_access — Manage GitLab access tokens, deploy tokens, deploy keys, access requests, and in...
- gitlab_admin — GitLab admin and instance-level operations.
- gitlab_analyze_ci_configuration — Analyze a GitLab project's CI/CD configuration using LLM-assisted analysis via M...
- gitlab_analyze_deployment_history — Analyze deployment history and patterns for a GitLab project using LLM-assisted ...
- gitlab_analyze_issue_scope — Analyze a GitLab issue's scope and effort using LLM-assisted analysis via MCP sa...
- gitlab_analyze_mr_changes — Analyze a GitLab merge request using LLM-assisted code review via MCP sampling.
- gitlab_analyze_pipeline_failure — Analyze a GitLab pipeline failure using LLM-assisted root cause analysis via MCP...
- gitlab_branch — Manage Git branches in GitLab projects.
- gitlab_ci_variable — Manage CI/CD variables in a GitLab project.
- gitlab_deployment — Manage deployments in a GitLab project.
- gitlab_environment — Manage environments in a GitLab project.
- gitlab_feature_flags — Manage GitLab feature flags and feature flag user lists.
- gitlab_find_technical_debt — Find and analyze technical debt in a GitLab project using LLM-assisted analysis ...
- gitlab_generate_milestone_report — Generate a comprehensive milestone progress report using LLM-assisted analysis v...
- gitlab_generate_release_notes — Generate polished release notes using LLM-assisted analysis via MCP sampling.
- gitlab_group — Manage GitLab groups and their members.
- gitlab_issue — Manage GitLab issues.
- gitlab_job — Manage GitLab CI/CD jobs.
- gitlab_merge_request — Manage GitLab merge requests.
- gitlab_mr_review — Review GitLab merge requests: notes, discussions, draft notes, file changes, and...
- gitlab_package — Manage GitLab Generic Package Registry and Container Registry.
- gitlab_pipeline — Manage GitLab CI/CD pipelines.
- gitlab_pipeline_schedule — Manage pipeline schedules in a GitLab project.
- gitlab_project — Manage GitLab projects, members, labels, milestones, webhooks, badges, boards, i...
- gitlab_release — Manage GitLab releases and their asset links.
- gitlab_repository — Interact with GitLab repository content: tree, compare, blobs, contributors, arc...
- gitlab_resolve_project_from_remote — Resolve a git remote URL to a GitLab project.
- gitlab_review_mr_security — Perform a security-focused review of a GitLab merge request using LLM-assisted a...
- gitlab_runner — Manage CI/CD runners in GitLab.
- gitlab_runner_controller — Manage GitLab runner controllers (admin only, experimental).
- gitlab_runner_controller_scope — Manage GitLab runner controller scopes (admin only, experimental).
- gitlab_runner_controller_token — Manage GitLab runner controller tokens (admin only, experimental).
- gitlab_search — Search within GitLab.
- gitlab_snippet — Manage GitLab snippets (personal and project), snippet discussions, and snippet ...
- gitlab_summarize_issue — Summarize a GitLab issue discussion using LLM-assisted analysis via MCP sampling...
- gitlab_summarize_mr_review — Summarize a GitLab merge request review using LLM-assisted analysis via MCP samp...
- gitlab_tag — Manage Git tags and protected tags in GitLab projects.
- gitlab_template — GitLab CI/CD templates and configuration validation.
- gitlab_user — GitLab user, SSH keys, GPG keys, emails, impersonation tokens, service accounts,...
- gitlab_wiki — Manage GitLab project wiki pages.

## Resources

24 read-only resources:

- gitlab://groups: groups
- gitlab://guides/code-review: code_review
- gitlab://guides/conventional-commits: conventional_commits
- gitlab://guides/git-workflow: git_workflow
- gitlab://guides/merge-request-hygiene: merge_request_hygiene
- gitlab://guides/pipeline-troubleshooting: pipeline_troubleshooting
- gitlab://user/current: current_user
- gitlab://group/{group_id}: group
- gitlab://group/{group_id}/members: group_members
- gitlab://group/{group_id}/projects: group_projects
- gitlab://project/{project_id}: project
- gitlab://project/{project_id}/branches: project_branches
- gitlab://project/{project_id}/issue/{issue_iid}: issue
- gitlab://project/{project_id}/issues: project_issues
- gitlab://project/{project_id}/labels: project_labels
- gitlab://project/{project_id}/members: project_members
- gitlab://project/{project_id}/milestones: project_milestones
- gitlab://project/{project_id}/mr/{mr_iid}: merge_request
- gitlab://project/{project_id}/pipeline/{pipeline_id}: pipeline
- gitlab://project/{project_id}/pipeline/{pipeline_id}/jobs: pipeline_jobs
- gitlab://project/{project_id}/pipelines/latest: latest_pipeline
- gitlab://project/{project_id}/releases: project_releases
- gitlab://project/{project_id}/tags: project_tags
- gitlab://workspace/roots: Workspace Roots

## Prompts

38 prompts:

- audit_branch_protection — Audit branch protection rules for a GitLab project.
- audit_project_access — Audit user access and permissions for a GitLab project.
- audit_project_full — Run a comprehensive audit of a GitLab project covering settings, branch protecti...
- audit_project_settings — Audit a GitLab project's core settings.
- audit_project_workflow — Audit workflow configuration for a GitLab project: labels (names, colors, descri...
- branch_mr_summary — List all MRs targeting a specific branch in a project.
- compare_branches — Compare two Git branches or refs showing commit differences and file changes bet...
- daily_standup — Generate a daily standup summary based on the user's GitLab activity in the last...
- generate_release_notes — Generate comprehensive release notes from commits, merge requests, and file chan...
- group_milestone_progress — Track milestone progress across all projects in a group.
- label_distribution — Analyze label usage distribution in a project.
- merge_velocity — Analyze MR throughput metrics for a project.
- milestone_progress — Track milestone progress for a project.
- mr_review_status — Analyze the discussion health of open MRs in a project.
- mr_risk_assessment — Assess the risk level (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL) of a merge request based on siz...
- my_activity_summary — Generate a personal activity summary for a configurable time period.
- my_issues — Show all issues assigned to you across all projects.
- my_open_mrs — Show all open merge requests across all projects where you are author or assigne...
- my_pending_reviews — Show all open merge requests where you are assigned as reviewer across all proje...
- project_activity_report — Generate a project activity report including recent events, merged MRs, and open...
- project_contributors — Rank project contributors by commits, additions, and deletions.
- project_health_check — Comprehensive project health assessment combining latest pipeline status, open m...
- release_cadence — Analyze release frequency for a project.
- release_readiness — Check readiness of a release branch by analyzing open MRs targeting it, draft/co...
- review_mr — Generate a structured code review for a merge request.
- reviewer_workload — Analyze review distribution across group members.
- stale_items_report — Find MRs and issues in a project that haven't been updated for a configurable nu...
- suggest_mr_reviewers — Suggest suitable merge request reviewers based on the files changed and the list...
- summarize_mr_changes — Summarize the changed files and key modifications in a merge request.
- summarize_open_mrs — Summarize all open merge requests in a project including title, author, branches...
- summarize_pipeline_status — Summarize the latest CI/CD pipeline status for a project.
- team_member_workload — Generate a comprehensive workload summary for a specific team member over a conf...
- team_mr_dashboard — List all merge requests for a GitLab group with optional state and target branch...
- team_overview — Generate a team dashboard showing all group members with their open MR counts an...
- unassigned_items — Find open MRs and issues in a project that have no assignee.
- user_activity_report — Generate a detailed activity report for a specific user: contribution events, me...
- user_stats — Generate comprehensive user statistics from GitLab: contribution events breakdow...
- weekly_team_recap — Generate a comprehensive weekly recap for a team.

- docs/configuration.md — Full configuration reference

- docs/tools/README.md — All tools reference

- docs/prompts-reference.md — Prompts reference
- docs/security.md — Security model
- llms-full.txt — Full tool listing with schemas
